title: Pan-Seared Quesadilla
description: A delicious and easy-to-make quesadilla recipe that's perfect for any meal. The combination of crunchy xcrispy, savory xoily, and flavorful xwhole30 makes this dish a standout.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the xoily to the skillet and sauté the onion until translucent.
Cut the quesadilla in half and place in the skillet.
Sprinkle the xcrispy and xwhole30 on half of the quesadilla.
Fold the other half of the quesadilla over the filling.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the quesadilla is crispy and the filling is heated through.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Cut into wedges and serve hot.
